metadata.description: Phase 1 mini bank: Texas-capital style True/False probes inspired by runpod_baseline wording.

templates.T1:
Statement: "{S}"
Answer with exactly one word: True or False.

questions.statement: Fact: the capital of the state containing Dallas is Austin.
questions.notes: Directly mirrors the runpod baseline pattern with the correct completion.

questions.statement: Fact: the capital of the state containing Dallas is Houston.

questions.notes: Intermediate hop in the Dallas -> Texas -> Austin reasoning chain.

questions.statement: Austin is the capital of Texas.
questions.notes: Canonical capital fact in plain form.
Simple contradiction to test false handling.
